pkgmetadata.longdescription: django-jinjaSimple and nonobstructive jinja2 integration with Django... image httpsimg.shields.iotravisniwinzdjango-jinja.svgstyleflat target httpstravis-ci.orgniwinzdjango-jinja.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypivdjango-jinja.svgstyleflat target httpspypi.python.orgpypidjango-jinjaDocumentation httpniwinz.github.iodjango-jinjalatestHow to install---------------You can install it with pip.. code-block shell pip install django-jinjaHow to run tests as a developer-------------------------------Install the Tox automation tool (outside a virtualenv), then.. code-block shell toxTox will create virtualenvs for different interpreter versions and run the test suite.
